properties.property: {"id":5,"name":"Trade - Advanced","x":3,"y":6,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_PSYCHIC_F","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rI\u0027m looking for a female Dragonair."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rWant to trade it for my Dodrio?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Yes","No"],2]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Yes"]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["Because there are more requirements than just "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["wanting the correct species, the method "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["pbChoosePokemonForTrade cannot be used here. "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["Instead, it is recreated using method "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["pbChooseTradeablePokemon."]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["The chosen Pok\u00E9mon\u0027s party index goes in Game "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["Variable 1. A value of -1 means no Pok\u00E9mon was "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["chosen."]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["The chosen Pok\u00E9mon\u0027s name goes in Game Variable 2."]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbChooseTradablePokemon(1, 2,"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" proc { |pkmn|"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" pkmn.isSpecies?(:DRAGONAIR) \u0026\u0026"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" pkmn.female?"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" }"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[")"]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[1,1,0,-1,0]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\rYou don\u0027t want to trade? Aww..."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\rOK, let\u0027s get started."]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["This trade is providing a special Dodrio with certain "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["custom modifications. You should define this Pok\u00E9mon "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["first and modify it, and then perform the trade. This "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["is because the modifications may affect the "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon\u0027s appearance (form/gender/shininess) which "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["will be seen during the trade animation."]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["Remember to add \u0022pkmn.calcStats\u0022 at the end. It "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["makes sure the Pok\u00E9mon\u0027s stats are correct, as some "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["modifications can affect them, e.g.changing "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["IVs/nature."]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["It doesn\u0027t hurt to have this line there anyway, even if "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["you don\u0027t affect the stats after all."]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["pkmn = Pokemon.new(:DODRIO,"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":[" pbGetPokemon(1).level"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":[")"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["pkmn.item = :SMOKEBALL"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["pkmn.makeFemale"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["pkmn.ability_index = 0 # Run Away"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["pkmn.nature = :IMPISH"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["pkmn.poke_ball = :LUXURYBALL"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["pkmn.learn_move(:SURF)"]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["pkmn.iv[:HP] = 20"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["pkmn.iv[:ATTACK] = 20"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["pkmn.iv[:DEFENSE] = 20"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["pkmn.iv[:SPECIAL_ATTACK] = 15"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["pkmn.iv[:SPECIAL_DEFENSE] = 15"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["pkmn.iv[:SPEED] = 15"]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["pkmn.calc_stats"]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["pbStartTrade(pbGet(1), pkmn,"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":[" _I(\u0022Doris\u0022), _I(\u0022Ayana\u0022), 1"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":[")"]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["The trade itself sets the received Pok\u00E9mon\u0027s "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["nickname, obtain method and OT details. These can "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["only be modified after the trade, although you "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["shouldn\u0027t need to do so."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\PN traded Dragonair for Dodrio!"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\rThanks!"]},{"c":123,"i":2,"p":["A",0]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"No"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\rYou don\u0027t want to trade?
